title: Civil Aviation Authority framework agreement
body: "This framework document defines the relationship between the Department for Transport (DfT) and the Civil Aviation Authority (CAA):  It sets out governance arrangements including:   roles and responsibilities of DfT and the CAA  governance structures overseeing the relationship between both bodies the CAA’s compliance with Managing Public Money (Annex B) other updates following the recommendations of the Public Body Review of the CAA    "
